description: LoRA weights for the uncertainty head (head_idx=9) on OLMo 7B. Trained for 10 epochs on MedMCQA shard 9 with interleaved frozen prod+robust heads as PoE-style verifiers; the step-5000 checkpoint (~epoch 4.14) was selected after a sweep of all 46 saved checkpoints showed top-bin [0.9, 1.0) accuracy plateauing in the 4-6 epoch window before later checkpoints overfit, flooding the [0.9, 1.0) bin with low-accuracy predictions (e.g. step 12070 = 0.59 acc, n=154 vs. step 5000 = 0.86 acc, n=131 on full validation).
parent_commit: 3481e50 (fix: restore missing N_hid dim squeeze in uncertainty engine)

config.loss: Brier score (MSE between sigmoid(logits[A] - logits[B]) and is_correct), via second-pass forward through the uncertainty head with the first-pass last-token hidden state injected as residual

eval.notes: Slightly under-confident overall (ECE dominated by the two lowest bins, where predicted ~0.07-0.15 vs empirical ~0.22-0.29). Near-monotonic across the full range with a small dip at [0.6, 0.7) (0.58 acc vs [0.5, 0.6) 0.61 acc). Top bin 0.86 empirical accuracy at 0.95 mean predicted confidence.
